pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script sets PROJECT_DIR to this path.
setup_task.sh generates a script generate_report.py which saves to output/patient_732_sim.csv.
setup_task.sh creates this script in the project directory.

setup_task.sh comments and source code generation confirm these are the fixes needed for the 3 injected bugs: kel uses division (ln(2)/t_half), accumulation adds dose/vd to existing concentration, and trapezoidal AUC loop iterates len(time)-1 times.

privileged_info_summary: The task takes place in /home/ga/PycharmProjects/pk_tools where patient simulation data is generated using a synthetic setup. The target output file is output/patient_732_sim.csv generated by generate_report.py. The underlying ground truth fixes for the bugs are mathematically verified: elimination rate (kel) requires division (ln(2)/half-life), multi-dose accumulation logic is additive, and the AUC trapezoidal calculation loop should iterate len(time)-1 times.
